###### Residences and hotel

###### Scroll to continue

![Start](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/46x5s8hx/production/1c027a735c2abfbf4ed87c2f5d8fe4df1fd10737-9000x6922.jpg)

You've arrived

## FOR THE   NEW   ROMANTICS

For the first time, the Dolce&Gabbana legacy of craftsmanship and expression come to life in the residences and hotel at 888 Brickell. This is where the creative, the curious, the makers, and the thinkers come to revel in the designers' dream.

View residences

![Start](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/46x5s8hx/production/c103b636c62e0580f93e2b277d31bf9717aa1c5a-4000x3978.jpg)

Our residences

##### America's First Dolce&Gabbana Residences

Building on their legacy of Italian craftsmanship, the pioneering designers Domenico Dolce and Stefano Gabbana translate their world of grandiosity into world-class residences in Miami.

[View residences](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/residences)

Our residences

##### America's First Dolce&Gabbana Residences

Building on their legacy of Italian craftsmanship, the pioneering designers Domenico Dolce and Stefano Gabbana translate their world of grandiosity into world-class residences in Miami.

[View residences](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/residences)

Our residences

##### A Window to the World

Where the sky meets the sea, residences are designed to invite life to flourish inside and out.

[View residences](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/residences)

Our residences

##### A Window to the World

Where the sky meets the sea, residences are designed to invite life to flourish inside and out.

[View residences](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/residences)

Our residences

##### Tailored to  you

Every aspect of the tower is designed with owners’ lifestyles in mind. Fluid floorplans allow residences to transform into high-style hotel suites with utmost service and discretion.

[View residences](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/residences)

Our residences

##### Tailored to  you

Every aspect of the tower is designed with owners’ lifestyles in mind. Fluid floorplans allow residences to transform into high-style hotel suites with utmost service and discretion.

[View residences](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/residences)

NEW\_DG\_FATTOAMANO\_SS23\_MAGLIAUOMO\_RE-EDITION\_16-9 from JDS Development Group on Vimeo

![video thumbnail](https://i.vimeocdn.com/video/1772555834-a1b6d54933eeba50371763f5be3416a1359ab2e0e33cabf0f4b989841b80b989-d?mw=80&q=85)

Playing in picture-in-picture

Pause

Settings

SpeedNormal

Picture-in-Picture

![Collection](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/46x5s8hx/production/584dcddb6027c117eca11bad2d1db5bfe889c838-538x892.jpg)

##### “Fatto a Mano”   made by hand

“Fatto a Mano”

made by hand

Designed with the discerning eye of Dolce&Gabbana, the tower and each of its residences embody the spirit of Italian craftsmanship known as Fatto a Mano.

![Collection](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/46x5s8hx/production/681cfbbc8f97ad071fb75d67cc408d4671ee3545-1618x2427.jpg)

##### Tailored for Your   Wildest Dreams

Tailored for Your

Wildest Dreams

For the first time, the gilded gravitas of the Dolce&Gabbana experience is extended to the home. Each residence goes beyond the expected to create a canvas for your Dolce&Gabbana lifestyle.

A facade of Roman travertine exudes a timeless elegance that has adorned many of the world's most iconic buildings. Combined with sculptural matte black steel beams, the building has an expressly vertical appearance, setting it far apart from its neighbors, standing at 1,049 feet tall.

Materials

##### A CORE BELIEF THAT MATERIALS MATTER

Hand selected materials from around the world elevate the every day while having the power of permanence. Every detail was hand-selected to invoke awe today while standing the test of time.

![Material](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/46x5s8hx/production/99e1c7e1bd40313192b6b02c372b8e7ba2a934f0-326x407.png)

Covelano Macchia Vecchia Marble

![Material](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/46x5s8hx/production/cfe84d424e18d5f3c2d7881511194aef0b06c87c-380x475.png)

Travertino Giallo

![Material](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/46x5s8hx/production/10be5e0b6249896a9141b13094cdd9b7b79ce55f-380x475.png)

Camelia Green Marble

![Material](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/46x5s8hx/production/ad6bb73a71b46720063ef249a08029bb66a4383a-652x814.png)

Sahara Noir Marble

Amenities

##### A PLAYGROUND FOR LIFE WITHOUT COMPROMISE

###### A PLAYGROUND FOR LIFE WITHOUT COMPROMISE

Everything at 888 Brickell is a Dolce&Gabbana dream, realized. From world-class fine dining to an on-site tailor and barber, experiences are designed for a life enjoyed to its fullest.

![Amenity](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/46x5s8hx/production/80932b34ffc5f8948933bb58f4baff6e6aa80d33-5000x2630.jpg)

Featured Amenities

- —Rolls Royce House Car

- —Private Residential Lobby

- —Signature Restaurant

- —On-Site Tailor

- —Beauty Salon & Barber Shop

- —Indoor Paddle Court

- —Fitness & Wellness Center

- —5,000 SF Meeting Space

- —3,800 SF Pool

- —Theater

- —Billiards Room

- —Wine Cellar


[Explore Amenities](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/amenities)

![Amenity](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/46x5s8hx/production/80932b34ffc5f8948933bb58f4baff6e6aa80d33-5000x2630.jpg)

Neighborhood

##### A Beacon Within The Magic City

Brickell is a cultural, hospitality, business, and residential hub epitomizing Miami's distinct elegance, style, and limitless possibility.

[Learn more](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/neighborhood)

Neighborhood

##### A Beacon Within The Magic City

Brickell is a cultural, hospitality, business, and residential hub epitomizing Miami's distinct elegance, style, and limitless possibility.

[Learn more](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/neighborhood)

Hotel

![Hotel](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/46x5s8hx/production/8b5e4f5b2e20187cbc796bb97300efa797ef8cc4-3001x4500.jpg)

##### A Destination to Dare and Dream

###### A Destination to Dare and Dream

Welcome to 888 Brickell, Miami's world-class residences and transformative hotel experience, inviting the world to revel within the Dolce&Gabbana lifestyle. In addition to signature dining and lifestyle amenities, residents and guests have access to extraordinary hotel services and curated events all in one place.

[Explore Hotel](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/hotel)

![Amenity](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/46x5s8hx/production/03f29935e985bff659060c80306cceb174d9f4fe-3001x4500.jpg)![Hotel](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/46x5s8hx/production/03f29935e985bff659060c80306cceb174d9f4fe-3001x4500.jpg)

Team

![Team main](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/46x5s8hx/production/df491082e0b4ee7da64e1c877fb164bb687eb1a6-703x878.png)

##### Pioneering Collaboration

The feat of a team united in their commitment to create long-lasting, emotional experiences through the power of design.

> “Fashion takes its inspiration from society and everyday life.“

Domenico Dolce & Stefano Gabbana

![Team item](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/46x5s8hx/production/9e17d51ba066d4f82aecdf5c907d38ecf5cabd4c-2746x3432.jpg)

Dolce&GabbanaDesigner

[Learn more](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/dolce-and-gabbana#start)

[Learn more](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/jds)

![Team item](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/46x5s8hx/production/02cd78bed743b52e630f75b8b11fa617b2a72b17-434x544.png)

Studio SofieldArchitect

[Learn more](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/studio-sofield)

web.description: The Dolce&Gabbana residence in its grandest form, two ensuite Bedrooms plus a Powder Room live graciously with a corner Great Room extending to a generous ...
web.markdown:
[Overview](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/residences) [Rooms](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/residences) [Finishes](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/residences) [Configurations](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/residences) [Inquire](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/residences)

### Residences for Discerning Lifestyles

Inspired by the importance of home in Italian culture, Dolce&Gabbana residences invite a life of style, designed by hand.

Start the Conversation

##### Elegant Glamour, Fatto a Mano

Designed with the discerning eye of Dolce&Gabbana, each residence is a canvas for you to live within your wildest dreams. At 888 Brickell, home is a lifestyle.

[Start the conversation](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/inquire)

![Glamour](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/46x5s8hx/production/4304887267a48facce0f2ed1b0b79acc261a0794-1614x1614.png)

##### Great room

Crafted to create everyday emotional experiences of living, the Great Rooms are designed to feel both intimate and inviting, acting in dual function as the center of the personal home, and a grand gathering place.

Features

1. Turnkey Residences Styled by Dolce&Gabbana
2. Ceiling heights up to 11' \*
3. Grand Living Rooms opening to Private Outdoor Space\*
4. Custom 888 building app with smart home technology
5. House phones and interface technology for concierge and services
6. Miele Washer and Dryer

##### Kitchen

Inspired by the importance of the kitchen in the Italian way of life, Dolce&Gabbana have handcrafted everything for utmost style and powerful, enduring function.

Features

1. Fully Integrated Sub Zero Refrigerator and Freezer
2. Sub Zero Wine Cooler\*
3. Fully Integrated Miele Dishwasher
4. Wolf Induction Cooktop
5. Wolf Stainless Steel Speed Oven\*
6. Wolf Warming Drawer
7. XO Disposer

##### Bedrooms

At once private and grand, the bedrooms are designed for ultimate privacy while offering access to around-the-clock hotel-style hospitality.

Features

1. Fully finished in floor-to-ceiling large format stone
2. Integrated medicine cabinets
3. Soaking tubs in select residences
4. Full height sliding glass doors in select residences

##### Bathrooms

Allowing your dreams to be realized from the moment you wake, bathrooms are crafted for ultimate functionality in a grandiose manner that only Dolce&Gabbana can deliver.

Features

1. En-suite Bathrooms
2. Custom Wardrobes
3. Gracious Entryways
4. Sliding Window Doors
5. Custom designed by Dolce&Gabbana

##### Finishes

The finest materials elevate the everyday, while having the power of permanence. Every detail was hand-selected to invoke awe today, while standing the test of time.

[— Travertino Giallo](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/residences)

Used by the Romans and sourced from the finest quarries in Italy, this is a material that makes any moment feel monumental.

[Covelano Macchia Vecchia Marble](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/residences)

[Sahara Noir Marble](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/residences)

Travertino Giallo

Used by the Romans and sourced from the finest quarries in Italy, this is a material that makes any moment feel monumental.

Covelano Macchia Vecchia Marble

A magical combination of light and dark creates a romantic sense of drama that allows you to feel immersed in the finest of history, at home.

Sahara Noir Marble

A marble evoking the cosmos, its strength in both style and material creates a sense of gravitas not typically seen in the home.

### Miami is a  place to be  seen, even in  the home

William Sofield, Architecht

Start the conversation

##### Tailored to you

Unique to 888 Brickell and designed for flexibility, homes seamlessly transition between a grand private residence, a corner hotel suite, and a highstyle hotel room. This is a defining feature of ownership at 888, inviting the ability for your residence to be tailored to your lifestyle. At 888, residents receive world-class hotel hospitality around the clock, along with exclusive amenities. Resident privacy is of utmost priority. State-of-the-art soundproofing and private entrances allow each resident to retain their discretion when hotel guests are enjoying the rooms and suites.

[— GRAND PRIVATE RESIDENCE](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/residences)

The Dolce&Gabbana residence in its grandest form, two ensuite Bedrooms plus a Powder Room live graciously with a corner Great Room extending to a generous Loggia with Outdoor Kitchen.

[DOLCE&GABBANA HOTEL SUITE](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/residences)

[DOLCE&GABBANA HOTEL ROOM](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/residences)

GRAND PRIVATE RESIDENCE

The Dolce&Gabbana residence in its grandest form, two ensuite Bedrooms plus a Powder Room live graciously with a corner Great Room extending to a generous Loggia with Outdoor Kitchen.

DOLCE&GABBANA HOTEL SUITE

With the Secondary Bedroom transitioned into a high-style hotel room, the Principal Bedroom and Great Room with Loggia become an intimate private residence or hotel suite.

DOLCE&GABBANA HOTEL ROOM

With a separate entrance from the private foyer, this thoughtfully conceived hotel room is a world of its own in Dolce&Gabbana splendor, independent of the corner suite.

Our residences

##### A Space to Connect

For Domenico Dolce and Stefano Gabbana, the Italian tradition of gathering for a meal around a table to connect is of utmost importance. At 888 Brickell, the dining spaces are at once grandly alluring yet designed for intimate connection.

[Start the conversation](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/inquire)

Our residences

##### A Space to Connect

For Domenico Dolce and Stefano Gabbana, the Italian tradition of gathering for a meal around a table to connect is of utmost importance. At 888 Brickell, the dining spaces are at once grandly alluring yet designed for intimate connection.

[Start the conversation](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/inquire)

Explore

[Neighborhood](https://888.dolcegabbana.com/neighborhood)

Explore
